description: Email campaign app for Debra Friednash — sends personalized cover letters via iCloud SMTP

stories.title: Fix unknown error on email send
stories.description: The send button shows 'Unknown error' because: (1) the API route returns error as a plain string but the UI reads data.error?.message, and (2) the Next.js dev server needs restarting to pick up ICLOUD_APP_PASSWORD from .env.local. Fix error serialization in the API route and error display in the UI so the real error is always shown.
acceptance: API route returns { success: false, error: { message: string } } consistently
UI displays the actual error string from the API, not 'Unknown error'
npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors
Dev server is restarted and ICLOUD_APP_PASSWORD is loaded
